name: LED Decorative Exit / Egress Light
shortDescription: Wall-mounted LED exit sign for hospitals, hotels and public buildings.
longDescription: A wall-mounted decorative exit sign for public buildings, hospitals, factories and hotels where emergency lighting needs to guide an orderly evacuation without looking industrial. Same 3W LED / 3-hour backup platform as the sleek ceiling range, in a wall-surface housing with mains, battery and photoluminescent operating modes.

images.alt: LED Decorative Exit / Egress Light supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
